summary: Complete CNS drug discovery campaign completed in 3 rounds of LLM design + docking + retrosynthesis. Designed 41 molecules total (15 R1 + 14 R2 + 12 R3), 20 selected with non-trivial routes. Best binding energy: -10.077 (quinazoline-piperazine-chlorofluorobenzamide). Top molecules feature quinazoline-piperazine-amide scaffold with halogen (F, Cl, CF3) and morpholine substituents. All molecules pass QED≥0.3, SA≤6.0, Lipinski rules, and have 2-4 step retrosynthesis routes. Best QED: 0.865 (tetrahydroisoquinoline sulfonamide), average SA score: 3.2. Key discovery: quinazoline-piperazine-amide scaffolds consistently achieve BE < -9.0 with excellent drug-likeness.
